utility_evaluation.REASONING:
1) Count items requested in the final format: 6 items — property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. 2) Count items appearing in the final property solution: It has selected_property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. That maps to all 6. 3) Check if fully specified per item: 
- property: Format asks for 'selected property with details and price'. Solution provides name, bedrooms (1-2), features, location, price_range, selected_price. Fully specified, though uses key 'selected_property' instead of 'property'; content is adequate. 
- financing: 'financing solution with terms' provided: type, LTV, interest rate range, amortization, down payment, joint financing. Adequate. 
- legal_services: 'legal services with costs' provided: package and cost. Adequate. 
- moving_services: 'moving arrangements with costs' provided: option and cost. Adequate. 
- setup_services: 'utility and setup services' provided: bundle and cost; not detailed utilities but still qualifies as setup services with cost. Adequate. 
- total_budget: 'complete cost breakdown' provided: property_price, legal_fees, property_survey, moving_services, setup_services, complete_cost. Adequate breakdown. All six are present and sufficiently detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes selections across purchase property, financing, legal services, moving services, and utility/setup services. I matched each selected item to the corresponding category and exact name in the ground-truth ratings: 'Modern Apartment Concept' aligns with 'Modern Apartment' in purchase_properties; 'Traditional Mortgage' matches the same-named option in purchase_financing; 'Standard Legal Package' best corresponds to 'Basic Legal Package' under essential_legal_services; 'Standard Moving' matches directly; 'Enhanced Bundle' refers to utilities/setup, which corresponds most closely to 'Premium Utilities' given the listed cost CAD $280.
